effects.text: If the vampire is blocked, there is no combat.

params.effect: that vampire may diablerize the acting vampire

effects.text: If the blocking minion is a vampire who can commit diablerie, that vampire may diablerize the acting vampire.

params.effect: commit diablerie, that vampire may diablerize the acting vampire
